narrative:
Green 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 891 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
